case_title: ABARA, STEVE P. VS QUALITY BRAKE SUPPLY, INC.

docket_entries.description: SERVICE OF COMPLAINT BY CERTIFIED MAIL

PARTIES WAIVE SERVICE ON PLAINTIFF'S CLAIM. THE COURT HAS ORDERED THE FOLLOWING JUDGMENT ENTERED: IT IS ADJUDGED THAT PLAINTIFF ABARA, STEVE P. RECOVER FROM DEFENDANT QUALITY BRAKE SUPPLY, INC. $19.23 PRINCIPAL, $20.00 COSTS, TOTAL JUDGMENT $39.23 STAY OF EXECUTION 30 DAYS
CERTIFIED MAIL TO JOE QUALITY BRAKE SUPPLY INC. RETURNED SIGNED.
MONEY CLAIM OF PLAINTIFF FOR $212.78 FILED BY ABARA, STEVE P. AS TO DEFENDANT QUALITY BRAKE SUPPLY, INC. ORDER SETTING TRIAL ISSUED FOR AUG-15-1994 AT 08:00 AM IN DEPT 05
ACKNOWLEDGMENT OF SATISFACTION OF JUDGMENT AS TO DEFENDANT QUALITY BRAKE SUPPLY, INC.
